subheader.lastRoom: Shot na ƙarshe: {score}. Akwai damar inganta.
subheader.beanUseSoon: {brand} · Rana {days} · yi amfani da shi da wuri

consent.title: Taimaka mana inganta Brewmie
consent.body: Ana raba shots ɗin ka ba tare da sunan ka ba don inganta shawarwari ga duk masu amfani. Ba a taɓa haɗa bayanan mutum, imel, ko asusun ba.

auth.toggleToSignUp: Ba ka da asusu? Ƙirƙira ɗaya
auth.privacyNote: Ƙaramin suna kawai. Babu kalmar sirri.
auth.nicknameSub: A gareka. Wannan kawai muke ajiyewa.

brew.setupPill: Kammala saiti don shawarwari mafi kyau
brew.beanWindowResting: Rana {age}. Yana hutawa. Mafi kyau bayan rana {start}.
brew.tipText: Saita grind, adadin, da manufofi a sama. Danna DAFA. Rubuta lokaci da yawa. Za mu faɗa maka abin da za a canza.
brew.errorTime: Lokacin manufa {time}s dole ne ya kasance 15 zuwa 45s
brew.reasonChannelling: Gudana a hankali, ƙaramin yawa. Matsalar shirye-shirye, ba grind ba. Sake shirya puck.
brew.reasonYieldOverFast: Yawa {ml}ml ya wuce. Ya gudu da sauri.
brew.reasonYieldUnderSlow: Yawa {ml}ml ya ƙasa. Ya gudu a hankali.
brew.reasonSour: Mai tsami. Kaɗan an ciro. Yi grind mai laushi.
brew.reasonBitter: Mai ɗaci. An ciro da yawa. Yi grind mai kauri.
brew.reasonRanLong: Ya gudu {seconds}s fiye. Yi grind mai kauri.
brew.reasonRanLongRoast: Ya gudu {seconds}s fiye. Yi grind mai kauri. ({roast} an ƙidaya.)
brew.reasonRanShort: Ya gudu {seconds}s ƙasa. Yi grind mai laushi.
brew.reasonRanShortRoast: Ya gudu {seconds}s ƙasa. Yi grind mai laushi. ({roast} an ƙidaya.)
brew.reasonCancelled: {primary} Shekarun wake da yanayi sun soke juna.
brew.reasonFlipFiner: {primary} Tsofaffin wake da yanayi sun canza zuwa mafi laushi.
brew.reasonFlipCoarser: {primary} Sabon wake da yanayi sun canza zuwa mafi kauri.
brew.coachPreviewCaption: Ja. Rikodi. Za mu faɗa abin da za a canza.
brew.coachLine: Ja. Rikodi. Za mu faɗa abin da za a canza na gaba.
brew.sectionHold: Bar shi don shot na gaba
brew.scoreBest: Mafi kyawun kanka. Ka ji daɗinsa sannu sannu.
brew.scoreSame: Daidai da na ƙarshe. Hannu mai tabbas.
brew.scoreFirst: Na farko ya tafi. Yanzu mu koya.
brew.reasonRanFastBoth: {seconds}s gajere kuma {ml}ml yawa. Niƙa mai laushi.
brew.reasonRanSlowBoth: {seconds}s tsayi kuma {ml}ml ƙaranci. Niƙa mai kauri.
brew.reasonGrindAtMin: {primary} Niƙa a mafi laushi — ƙara kashi.
brew.reasonGrindAtMax: {primary} Niƙa a mafi kauri — rage kashi.
brew.doseGrindAtMin: Niƙa a mafi laushi. +0.5g don ƙarin juriya.
brew.doseGrindAtMax: Niƙa a mafi kauri. −0.5g don ƙarancin juriya.

setup.profileBody: Faɗa mana abin da kake jawo shots a kai. Sau ɗaya. Sannan kawai dafa.
setup.tamperManualHint: Saita tamp a Brewscreen don kowane shot.
setup.ageTooFresh: Da sauri, bar ya fitar da gas
setup.privacyLabel: Raba bayanan shot ba tare da sunan ka ba
setup.deleteAccountWarning: Ana share shots dinka, kayan aikinka, da bayanan martabarka daga sabar mu. Ba a iya juyar da wannan ba.

wizard.step2Sub: Madubin da aka fi juyawa. Ba mu kewayon sa.
wizard.step3Sub: Riƙe tamp ɗin daidai daga shot zuwa shot.
wizard.step4Sub: Ranar gasawa tana da muhimmanci. Za mu ƙidaya ta.

insights.title: Shots, an bi didigi.
insights.dataNote: Shots ɗin ka suna nan. Fitar ko shiga don riƙe su a duk na'urori.
insights.confirmClear: Share duk tarihin shots? Ba za a iya mayar ba.
insights.confirmReset: Sake saita DUKKAN bayanan ciki har da na'ura, mashin grind, da tarihin shots? Ba za a iya mayar ba.
insights.importInvalid: Fayil mara inganci. Zaɓi fitar da Brewmie mai inganci.
insights.confirmDeleteShot: Sharar wannan shot? Ba zai komo ba.
insights.noTopShots: Yi rikodin shot 85+ don saita maki naka.
insights.deleteAccountEmail: Don share asusu, aika imel zuwa chef@lazysous.app

hero.statusReady: Saita girke-girke. Ja abin da yake muhimmanci.
hero.statusKeepPulling: Ci gaba da ja. Muna koyo.
hero.beanUseSoon: Rana {days} · yi amfani da shi nan da nan
hero.setupAllSet: A shirye duk lokacin da kake.
hero.setupEmptySub: Mintuna biyar. Shot mafi kyau bayan.

premium.title: Brewmie da aka daidaita gareka.
premium.triggerGrinder: Ƙara niƙanka — shawarwari a cikin sashinka.
premium.triggerTamper: Tamper na spring da auto suna shiga samfurin.
premium.triggerBeans: Ajiye wakenka. Canja jaka, ci gaba inda ka tsaya.
premium.triggerBenchmarks: Kwatanta kowane shot da mafi kyawunka.
premium.feature1Sub: Niƙa, tamper, wake. Shawarwari a cikin sashinka.
premium.feature2Sub: Kowane shot an ajiye. Fitarwa kowane lokaci.
premium.feature3Sub: Kwatanta kowane shot da mafi kyawunka.
premium.devNote: Dev: buɗewa ta dev pill. Ba ainihin saye ba.

tierLock.historyMore: Tsofaffin shots an ajiye su. Cikakken tarihi tare da Premium.
tierLock.benchmarksLocked: Buɗe maƙalattai na kai tare da Premium.
tierLock.genericGrinder: Niƙa na gama-gari. Premium ya daidaita zuwa naka.
tierLock.genericTamper: Tamp na hannu. Premium yana ƙara spring da auto.
tierLock.genericBeans: Soyayyen matsakaici na gama-gari. Premium yana bin wakenka.

maintBackflush.body1: Your group head wants a word. Two minutes with a blind basket and you're sorted.
maintBackflush.body2: The puck screen can't save you forever. Quick backflush and move on.
maintBackflush.body3: Coffee oils are doing their best impression of tar. Backflush today.

maintDescale.body1: The water is judging you. Descale today and the next shot will thank you.
maintDescale.body2: Your boiler's been carrying a passenger for three months. Time to evict it.
maintDescale.body3: Pull a kettle of citric through the boiler. Future you, mid-shot, is grateful.

maintGrinder.body1: Stale fines are sitting in the burrs. Pop the hopper off and give it a brush.
maintGrinder.body2: Old grounds are throwing off your dial-in. Brush, wipe, back in business.
maintGrinder.body3: Four weeks of fines have opinions about your next shot. Settle them.

rateReminder.body1: Mai tsami, daidaitacce, ko mai daci? Brewmie na jiran hukunci.
rateReminder.body2: Crema ya zauna. Ka gaya mana yadda yake.
rateReminder.body3: Kar ka bar shot din ba tare da kima ba. Algorithm na koyon kowane.

dailyPing.body1: The machine's ready when you are.
dailyPing.body2: Same time, same machine. Pull one.
dailyPing.body3: Beans are waiting. So is the timer.

beansPeak.body1: Rana 7 daga gasawa. Wake naka yana saman a yau. Ja yayin da suke waƙa.
beansPeak.body2: Wake naka yana wuri mai daɗi. Bi rikodin kanka.
beansPeak.body3: Wake na cikin yanki. Shot mai sauri yayin da suke mafi kyau.

beansStale.body1: Kwana talatin daga gasawa. Lokaci ya yi a daina amfani da wannan jaka.
beansStale.body2: Wake naka na rasa karfinsa. Sabbi za su daidaita tsabta.
beansStale.body3: Wake na wata daya na ban kwana. Sabuwar jaka, sabon daidaitawa.
